title: Paper accepted at IEEE T-ITS
description: Our paper on wrong-way cycling detection has been published in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems.

title: CEEH paper released on arXiv
description: Our work on difficulty-aware entropy regularization for efficient LLM reasoning is now available on arXiv.

title: Unified Agent Training Framework @ DiDi
description: Built shared-weight multi-agent training framework at DiDi LLM Lab. Served as both infra and algorithm lead. Achieved better results than DeepSeek V3.1 (671B) on GLM4-Flash (30B MoE) with significantly lower compute and faster inference.
